section_miscategorizations.text: CMP and CBC were essentially unremarkable.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Laboratory results are objective clinical data and fit better under Findings than in the patient history narrative.

section_miscategorizations.text: She denies recent travel or exposure to the coronavirus and has received her coronavirus vaccine on February 9th.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Travel/exposure history and vaccination status are elements of history rather than physical exam or objective findings.
